name: devflow_pipeline_expert
description: Expert skill for DevFlow 16-stage pipeline operations: stage execution, artifact validation, blocker diagnosis, and source artifact management.
capabilities: run orchestrator.py for a specified stage
check source_artifacts/ package manifest for required source_id
identify and report missing_groups in artifact validation
advise on stage retry vs source artifact remediation

save_id.description: Active save ID (optional, defaults to current active save)

action.description: Operation to perform on the target stage

anti_patterns: do not bypass orchestrator.py and write directly to outputs/
do not restore *_crew.py as execution entry
do not add new requirements during stage 10/11 execution
